Plugin.Name: UGREEN iDX6011 Pro Front Panel
Plugin.Overview: Fully customisable touch LCD dashboard + smart front-panel LEDs and fan control for the UGREEN NASync iDX6011 Pro, running natively on Unraid - no UGOS required. Build your own dashboard pages from a module library, drive the fans, and theme everything from the Unraid web UI. Model-gated via DMI, so it safely no-ops on other hardware.
Plugin.Description:
Touch LCD dashboard + smart front-panel LEDs for the **UGREEN NASync iDX6011 Pro**, running natively on Unraid - no UGOS required.
- **Customisable dashboard** on the 258x960 front touchscreen: build any page from a library of modules (CPU, memory, network, storage, GPU, NPU, power, fans, uptime, array status, OS/plugin updates, docker, VMs, and per-item disk / interface / container / VM cards), each with a choice of visual styles - bar, ring, gauge, history graph, area, blocks, split, trend or big number. - **Web Layout editor** with a live preview: add / rename / reorder / delete pages, pick each module's style, and theme the font, sizes and full colour palette. Point at any image on the server for the **wallpaper / header logo** (hot-swaps live, no restart), make cards translucent, hide the header / title / page-dots for a **full-screen image page**, add spacer gaps, and save / load / share **theme presets**. - **Fan control**: drive all four chassis fans on temperature curves (Auto / Silent / Quiet / Turbo) or Max, with a never-stall floor - live RPM and an animated spinning-fan card. - **Smart front LEDs** (power / 2x LAN / 6x disk): configurable colours, SMART health (green/amber/red), LAN link, and an activity mode that blinks on I/O. - Self-contained: downloads a SHA256-verified payload and registers its own EFI boot entry (no UGOS/NVMe/grub dependency). Model-gated via DMI - no-ops on other hardware.
Requires the BIOS Watchdog Timer disabled and the panel EFI entry set first in the BIOS boot order. See the project README before installing.
Plugin.Changes: ###2026.07.13 - Fully customisable dashboard with a module library and many visual styles; web Layout editor with a live preview; panel-driven four-fan curve control (Auto/Silent/Quiet/ Turbo/Max) with an animated Fans card; theming (font, sizes, full palette incl. card-title and dim colours, network units); richer stats (docker container IPs + update flags, VMs, NPU, fans); smarter configurable front LEDs; and a redesigned settings UI. - Wallpapers and themes: point at any image on the server for the wallpaper / header logo (hot-swapped live, no restart); translucent cards (global or per-page opacity), spacer gaps, and per-page full-screen image pages (hide header / title / dots); plus theme presets you can save, load and share as files. - Power-save schedule: turn the screen and disk/LAN LEDs off between two local times (quiet hours); a tap wakes everything and it re-sleeps 30s after the last touch. The timezone comes from Unraid automatically. ###2026.07.12.1 - New plugin icon. ###2026.07.12 - Initial release. The full front panel for the UGREEN NASync iDX6011 Pro on Unraid.
